Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_COMMON_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}There might be a treasure chest up ahead, but I sense an enemy presence there, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you're worn out from battling, don't push yourself too hard. Take some time to recuperate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_COMMON_FUKA_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It looks as though you've defeated all of the Shadows in this area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}All we have to do now is open that treasure chest. Let's do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_RETURN_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful. It's easy to get lost here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WIN_RETURN_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If it gets dangerous, don't hesitate to retreat.[n]{f 1 1}
